pattern: Removing a prefix and suffix leaves a contiguous block, so the task is counting subarrays by their product taken modulo k.
hints: Every choice of prefix and suffix to remove leaves some non-empty contiguous subarray; you are tallying those by product mod k.
Subarrays ending at position i extend the subarrays ending at i-1, multiplied by nums[i], plus the single element itself.
Keep a length-k tally of remainders for subarrays ending at the current index, roll it forward by multiplying through nums[i] mod k, and accumulate into the answer.

edge_inputs.description: powers of two with k four
ones around a single two, k two
k equals one, all remainders zero
values divisible by k push products to zero
all ones, every product is one

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(1, 5)
    return [nums, k]
stress.note: k stays tiny per the constraints
